===Etymology===
{{ja-kanjitab|あぜ|yomi=irr}}
First attested in the ''{{w|Myōgoki}}'' (1275); of {{unc|ja|nocap=1}} origin; but one theory suggests cognancy with {{m|ja|あぜ|畔・畦|tr=aze}}.<ref name="KDJ20warp">{{R:Nihon Kokugo Daijiten 2 Online|あぜ 【綜】|lid=20020015a7f1tPdzX39A|kotobank=綜}}</ref>
